headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $119
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Alexander Goldfarb   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $108 to $119.
